---
title: "Appendix"
body-classes: no-chapter-nav
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

This is an overview of additional material we provide:

-   In [Materials](81-materials.qmd), you can download all necessary data and code.

-   In [Coding style](82-coding-style.qmd), we provide best practice guidelines for coding.

-   In [Glossary](83-glossary.qmd), you can get a useful overview of important functions.

-   In the [GitHub forum](84-forum.qmd), you can discuss questions with others.

-   In [FAQ R](85-faq-r.qmd), we provide an overview of common R question.

-   In [FAQ Class/exam](86-fac-class.qmd), we provide an overview of common questions about the class/exam.
